name: TIMP2
summary: TIMP2 is normalized for human cord-plasma aged-mouse hippocampal function evidence.
mechanism_summary: Represents tissue inhibitor of metalloproteinases 2 as a candidate circulating factor mediating cord-plasma effects on aged brain readouts.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Human cord plasma TIMP2 aged mouse hippocampus study; Human cord plasma revitalized hippocampal function in aged mice.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
